zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Tyrrell於大約1335年出生在英國哈普爾阿沃時，他的父親Sir James Tyrell56歲，母親Margaret Heron42歲。他於1374年與Eleanor Flambard在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1412年之前在英國艾可易亞斯特 霍登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Tyrrell于大约1335年出生在英国哈普爾阿沃时，他的父亲Sir James Tyrell56岁，母亲Margaret Heron42岁。他于1374年与Eleanor Flambard在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1412年之前在英国艾可易亞斯特 霍登。

nameMeanings.name: Tyrrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): perhaps a nickname from a derivative of Old French tirer ‘to pull’, in the same sense as French Tirand ‘one who pulls on the reins’, hence ‘obstinate, stubborn’. This name may have become confused with Turrell . A branch of this Anglo-Norman family has been in Ireland since the 12th century. Its name has been Gaelicized as Tirial.
English: habitational name from Tirril (Cumbria), which derives from Old Norse tyri ‘resinous wood’ + erg ‘shieling’.

variants.name: Terrel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Terrell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Tirrell
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Terrill
meanings: English (Cornwall; of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Turrell
meanings: most frequently an Anglo-Norman French pronunciation of Thorold (Old Norse Thóraldr, from the elements Thórr ‘Thor’ + valdr ‘power, rule’). This name and that in 2 may have become confused with Tyrrell .
from Middle English T(h)urild (Old Norse Thórhildr, Thorild, the latter a rare woman's name from the divine name Thórr ‘Thor’ + hildr ‘battle’).

variants.name: Tyrell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Trill
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived by the turnstile at the entrance to a village.
English (Sussex, also Kent): nickname, perhaps from Middle English tril(le) ‘turn, roll, whirl, spin’ (origin unknown, but perhaps Old English tyrl).

English (Sussex, also Kent) and Welsh: habitational name from one or more places named with Middle English tril(le) ‘turn, roll, whirl, spin’ (Old English tyrl), often used to describe moving water, such as Trill in Axminster (Devon), Tirle Brook (Gloucestershire and Worcestershire), and Trill Mill Brook (Oxfordshire).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Tyrrell was born about 1335, in Avon, Hampshire, England, his father, Sir James Tyrell, was 56 and his mother, Margaret Heron, was 42. He married Eleanor Flambard in 1374, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 1412, in East Horndon, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Tyrrell est né environ 1335, à Avon, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir James Tyrell, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Margaret Heron, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Flambard en 1374, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 1412, à East Horndon, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Tyrrell um 1335 in Avon, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James Tyrell 56 und seine Mutter Margaret Heron 42. Er hat 1374 in Essex, England Eleanor Flambard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 1412 in East Horndon, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Tyrrell è nato il circa 1335 nel Avon, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, Sir James Tyrell, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Heron, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Flambard nel 1374, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1412, nel East Horndon, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Tyrrellが約1335年にイギリスハンプシュアイアアボンで生まれた時，父Sir James Tyrellは56歳，母Margaret Heronは42歳であった。1374年にイギリスエセックスでEleanor Flambardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1412年以前にイギリスエセックスエアスト ホールンドンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Tyrrell(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 함프실르 아폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Tyrell(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Heron(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1374년 영국 에세스에서 Eleanor Flambard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1412년 이전 영국 에세스 이스트 호른던에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Tyrrell nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Avon, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir James Tyrell, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Heron, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Flambard em 1374, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1412, em East Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Tyrrell родился около 1335 г. в местности авон, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir James Tyrell было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Heron, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Flambard в 1374 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 1412 г. в местности эаст хаурндон, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Tyrrell nació aproximadamente 1335, en Avon, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir James Tyrell, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Margaret Heron, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Eleanor Flambard en 1374, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 1412, en East Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra.
